title: Alibaba-affiliate Ant Group rushes into humanoid robots with a dozen deals in 18 months
summary_full: Ant has led a 500 million yuan ($73.59 million) funding round in humanoid robotics company Zeroth, the start-up announced Thursday.
summary_public: Ant has led a 500 million yuan ($73.59 million) funding round in humanoid robotics company Zeroth, the start-up announced Thursday.
